THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF LEGIONWORX, LLC DBA ADRIAN HOTEL IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT FIRST DATA CORPORATION IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DANIEL TEJADA, BUSINESS CONSULTANT. FIRST DATA MERCHANT SERVICES, LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DANIEL TEJADA, BUSINESS CONSULTANT. WELLS FARGO MERCHANT SERVICES, LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DANIEL TEJADA, BUSINESS CONSULTANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: SAM LAW CLERK: G. FELICIANO. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-12-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-09-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE REPRESENTATIVE FOR THE PLAINITFF IS AN ATTORNEY. THE MATTER IS CONTINUED TO ALLOW THE PLAINTIFF THE OPPORTUNITY TO HAVE ANOTHER REPRESENTATIVE PRESENT. PLAINTIFF LEGION WORX, LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ED CLEMENTS, AGENT. DEFENDANTS FIRST DATA CORPORATION, FIRST DATA MERCHANT SERVICES, LLC AND WELLS FARGO MERCHANT SERVICES, LLC ARE PRESENT. ALL DEFENDANTS ARE REPRESENTED BY DANIEL TESJADA, BUSINESS CONSULTANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE FOR FIRST DATA CORPORATION. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO THE ORDER SIGNED ON 12/07/2021 BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG.
